roles.title: Bar Staff
roles.description: Serve drinks, prepare cocktails and Irish coffees, pull pints, and deliver great hospitality. Experience preferred but training provided for the right attitude.
requirements: Flexible hours including evenings and weekends

roles.title: Chef / Kitchen Staff
roles.description: Prepare fresh local seafood, Irish breakfasts, bar food, and our famous chowder. Work with produce from our own boat and local suppliers.
requirements: Food hygiene certification (or willingness to obtain)

roles.title: Floor / Wait Staff
roles.description: Table service in the restaurant and coffee shop. Greet guests, take orders, serve food, and ensure everyone leaves with a smile.

roles.title: Coffee Shop / Barista
roles.description: Morning and daytime shifts in our coffee shop overlooking Clew Bay. Serve breakfast, light bites, and coffee to tourists and locals.

roles.title: Events / Function Coordinator
roles.description: Coordinate private events, weddings, and functions in our 180-capacity room. Liaise with clients, manage bookings, and ensure smooth events.
